title: artanthe scabra
intro: Artanthe scabra, also known as the rough passionflower, is a plant species that belongs to the Passifloraceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat anxiety and insomnia due to its sedative effects. The leaves and stems of the Artanthe scabra plant are used to prepare herbal remedies, which may help alleviate symptoms of depression and promote relaxation. Herbal preparations of Artanthe scabra can be consumed as teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat other health issues such as inflammation and fever.
